response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the tenure requirement with 20 years of software engineering experience and holds appropriate staff-level credentials, the role requires specialized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms. The candidate's AI exposure is recent (14 months in current role) and limited to infrastructure and tooling; there is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, advanced AI credentials, or strategic customer advisory work in AI/cloud adoption.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year tenure requirement with 20 years of multi-domain software engineering
Staff-level technical excellence with demonstrated software craftsmanship and teaching leadership
Recent AI infrastructure work (MCP, agent frameworks) shows openness to emerging technologies
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms built—core requirement for AI strategy role
AI expertise is very recent and limited to infrastructure/tooling, not strategic product or platform work
No advanced degree in AI/ML and no recognized standing in AI community

key_factors.factor: Insufficient depth in AI strategy expertise
